title: Gaslamp Quarter Food Tour - Brothels, Bites and Booze
description: The Brothels, Bites & Booze food tour in the Gaslamp Quarter is a quirky, fun, and historical culinary adventure through one of San Diego's most vibrant neighborhoods. This tour combines the rich history of the area with a sampling of delicious food and craft beverages. Here's a breakdown of what you can expect: 1. Historical Insight: The Gaslamp Quarter was once notorious for its seedy past, with brothels, saloons, and gambling halls operating in the late 19th and early 20th centuries. The tour highlights the history of this area, touching on the stories of vice and the characters who frequented the streets. Guides often share intriguing tales of the Wild West, lawlessness, and colorful personalities that shaped the area. 2. Delicious Food Stops: The "bites" part of the tour focuses on sampling a variety of local foods. Expect to try a mix of upscale and casual dishes from some of the best eateries in the Gaslamp Quarter. These stops might include bites like freshly made tacos, savory small plates, or seafood delicacies, depending on the tour's route. 3. Craft Cocktails and Local Brews: Of course, no tour of the Gaslamp would be complete without a little booze! You'll sip on craft cocktails, local beers, or perhaps a glass of wine while hearing about the area's storied past. Some stops might feature historical speakeasies or modern cocktail lounges where expert mixologists craft unique drinks. 4. Vibrant Atmosphere: The Gaslamp Quarter itself is a lively and eclectic mix of old Victorian buildings and modern establishments. As you stroll through the streets, you'll get to soak in the ambiance, from neon lights to ornate architecture, all while learning about the evolution of the neighborhood. 5. Unique Experience: It's a mix of history, culture, and flavor—offering a little something for everyone: history buffs, foodies, and drink enthusiasts alike. Along the way, you'll be entertained with stories about the area's famous residents, notorious events, and the evolution of the neighborhood. The Brothels, Bites & Booze tour is an interactive, lighthearted experience that offers a memorable blend of food, drink, and San Diego's colorful past. Whether you're a local or a visitor, it's a fun way to explore the Gaslamp Quarter's rich history and indulge in its culinary scene.

title: Susan G. Komen Breast Cancer 3-Day Cheering Station in Del Mar Village
description: Join DMVA in painting the town pink and cheering on more than 2,000 walkers as the San Diego Susan G. Komen 3-Day® kicks off in Del Mar! This cheering station is an annual outpouring of support from the community that welcomes the walkers with pink balloons and ribbons. Cheerleaders from Torrey Pines High School, the Del Mar Lifeguards, local business owners and community residents line the streets to cheer the event participants on their journey as they head south to San Diego. Anyone interested in participating in this fun and inspirational morning is encouraged to dress in pink and come to Del Mar Village just south of 15th Street on Camino Del Mar (Highway 101) between 8:00 and 9:30 AM.

title: Hans Kim
description: Hans Kim is an innovative and groundbreaking stand-up comedy act known for his intelligent yet irreverent approach to his material. Drawing inspiration from his Korean background and broader pop culture, Hans Kim is capable of making audiences laugh in ways that few before him have been capable of.

title: Thievery Corporation
description: Thievery Corporation is an electronic music duo from Washington who has been performing since 1995. Their albums "The Cosmic Game" and "Radio Retaliation" were both #1 on The Billboard Dance/Electronic chart. Their most popular tracks are "Lebanese Blonde," "Sweet Tides," and "Until The Morning."

title: Peter Hook and the Light
description: Peter Hook and the Light is a post-punk band led by Peter Hook, the legendary bassist of Joy Division and New Order. The band performs classic tracks from both iconic groups, bringing their influential music to new audiences. With Hook’s distinctive basslines and nostalgic setlists, their performances are a must-see for fans of post-punk history.

title: Spafford
description: Brian Moss and Jordan Fairless founded the American jam band Spafford. The band is known for their astonishing improvisational ability and off-the-cuff extended jams. Spafford paints a picture in real-time each night with a unique musical palette.

title: Mariachi Sol De Mexico
description: Founded in 1981 by Maestro Jose Hernandez, Mariachi Sol De Mexico is a 13-piece ensemble that celebrates the most joyful and impressive cultural heritages. They provide a rich experience through guitars, emotional vocals, and colorful traditional outfits called charro suits. Their most popular tracks include "Mi Jalisco," "El Popurri Jose Jose," and "Tema Y Popurri De Torros."

title: Banda La Adictiva
description: Banda La Adictiva is an award-winning Latin band from Mexico renowned for its unique fusion of traditional Mexican Banda music and contemporary regional Mexican sounds. Led by vocalist El Fantasma, their music video for the hit single 'Desatame' went viral in 2018, earning them a Billboard nomination for Top Latin Song of the Year.

title: Nate Bargatze
description: You may recognize "absolutely hilarious" comedian Nate Bargatze from his Netflix specials, Jimmy Fallon's "Clean Cut Comedy Tour," or from winning New York’s Comedy Festival and the Boston Comedy Festival in the same year. His first comedy album "Yelled At By A Clown" made it to number two on Billboard Top Ten Comedy and his follow-up special "Full Time Magic" was number one.

title: Boundless
description: <p>Boundless: Reflections of the Southern California Landscapes in Midcentury Studio Ceramics explores how the physical, social, and political landscapes of the area shaped craft. Nearly 150 objects from Mingei’s permanent collection, set against large-scale photography, transport us to the breathtaking locations reflected in the ceramics. Through these landscapes and the awe-inspiring science of clay, glaze, and <a href="https://balboapark.org/event/boundless/" class="more-link">...</a></p>\n
